vulnerability.reason: generated describes acceptance without detection; reference describes systematic divergence of lottery outcomes concentrating losses

vulnerability.generated: Applicants and communities accept lottery-based allocative fairness without the ability to detect or challenge systematic individual-level disparities.

dose_response.reference: Lottery-based allocation with fairness-in-expectation yields unequal realized access, concentrating losses in demographic groups, causing community mistrust, legal challenges, and deepened educational inequity.
dose_response.generated: Fairness-in-expectation mechanisms producing individual-level unfairness, through lottery-based scarce opportunity allocation, trigger acceptance of unfair outcomes without detection or challenge, leading to unequal realized access eroding trust and widening opportunity gaps.
